hero.title: Secure your private strategy consultation.
hero.leadBeforeName: Direct access to senior AI full stack leadership: architecture, LLM roadmaps, and execution plans for teams working with

profileCard.feeNote: This session covers system design, LLM integration strategy, technical risk review, and roadmap prioritization.

preparation.heading: Preparation
items: Name the top technical bottlenecks or product risks.
Share architecture diagrams or links if they exist.
List three outcomes you want decided by the end of the hour.

form.reasonPlaceholder: Describe objectives, current stack, constraints, and what success looks like.
form.attachmentsHint: PDF, images, or Word. Max 10MB each.
form.legalNote: By confirming, you agree to reasonable notice for rescheduling. We follow up by email.

messages.needDateAndSlot: Please choose a date and a time slot.
messages.success: Session requested. You will receive confirmation if email is configured.
messages.failure: Could not submit. Check fields and try again.
